team-lead: Create a view that selects only the safe columns, grant SELECT on the view, and revoke access to the base table
view-boundary: It exposes only the columns and rows its definition selects, and the database enforces that — a user granted the view but revoked on the base table literally cannot reach the hidden data
auditing: A record of who actually DID what, from which account and when — the accountability that makes integrity enforceable, and a legal requirement under HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and SOX
